name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.2 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 56 skills, 35 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.2 completes the release-integrity pass: a single VERSION file is the source of truth for every version site (this manifest included); render-manifest --check fails CI on any version drift across the CHANGELOG, the Codex manifest, and the rendered Claude manifests; the SubagentStart hook is single-sourced so POSIX and Windows can't diverge; README and manifest catalog counts render from one template.
compatibility_notes: V9.2.0 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata. This file is the one hand-maintained version site; render-manifest-template.py --check asserts its version equals the VERSION file.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
